cleavage agent: Trypsin digestion was carried using TPCK treated trypsin
collision energy: using higher-energy collision dissociation mode at 45% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: coupled with anti-phosphotyrosine antibody-based enrichment approach
fragmentation method: using higher-energy collision dissociation mode at 45% normalized collision energy
instrument: LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer interfaced with Proxeon Easy nLC system
labeling: We employed tandem mass tag (TMT)-based labeling technology
